parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.rescue_queue (
  queue_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
  pipeline_id BIGINT,
  status_id BIGINT,
  rescue_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  rescue_label TEXT NOT NULL,
  wait_hours INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 24,
  max_attempts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
  attempt INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  execute_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  not_before_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  block_reason TEXT,
  last_event_type TEXT,
  last_stage_name TEXT,
  snapshot_last_stage_name TEXT,
  last_message_id TEXT,
  last_message_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  last_message_actor TEXT,
  last_message_hash TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

ALTER TABLE public.rescue_queue
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS not_before_at TIMESTAMPTZ;

ALTER TABLE public.rescue_queue
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS snapshot_last_stage_name TEXT;

ALTER TABLE public.rescue_queue
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_message_id TEXT;

ALTER TABLE public.rescue_queue
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_message_at TIMESTAMPTZ;

ALTER TABLE public.rescue_queue
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_message_actor TEXT;

ALTER TABLE public.rescue_queue
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_message_hash TEXT;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rescue_queue_status_execute_at
  ON public.rescue_queue(status, execute_at);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rescue_queue_status_not_before_at
  ON public.rescue_queue(status, not_before_at);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rescue_queue_lead_rescue
  ON public.rescue_queue(lead_id, rescue_type, status_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.rescue_history (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  queue_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  lead_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
  attempt INTEGER NOT NULL,
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  result TEXT NOT NULL,
  details TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rescue_history_queue_key
  ON public.rescue_history(queue_key);
